Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.SizeVerifier

Packages that use SizeVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava that return SizeVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    SizeVerifier MultimapVerifier.size()

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.size​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

  • Uses of SizeVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return SizeVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    SizeVerifier SizeVerifier.isNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    SizeVerifier SizeVerifier.isNotNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    SizeVerifier StringVerifier.length()
    Returns a verifier for the length of the actual value.
    SizeVerifier CollectionVerifier.size()
    Returns a verifier for the collection's size.
    SizeVerifier MapVerifier.size()
    Returns a verifier for Map.size().
    Method parameters in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java with type arguments of type SizeVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.length​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    CollectionVerifier<C,​E> CollectionVerifier.size​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.size​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension that return SizeVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    SizeVerifier ExtensibleArrayVerifier.length()
    Returns a verifier over the array's length.
    SizeVerifier ExtensibleCollectionVerifier.size()
    Returns a verifier over the collection's size.

    class  SizeVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of a SizeVerifier.
